Setlist
Venue Info
Media Gallery
PNC Music Pavilion Charlotte
Charlotte, NC
Previous Names:
Blockbuster Pavilion (Changed after 2000)
Verizon Wireless Amphitheatre Charlotte (Changed after 2013)
Seating Capacity: 19500
Venue Type : Outdoor Amphitheater

Total Gigs: 25
  DMB  (25)

Longest Performance:
06.18.97 - #41 (21:01)

Song Liberations
  6.20.06 – Pay for What You Get (after 1031 days)
  4.24.09 – Blue Water (after 5172 days)
  7.21.10 – Minarets (after 1681 days)
  7.21.10 – Some Devil (after 1060 days)
  7.24.13 – Kit Kat Jam (after 1119 days)
  7.24.21 – If Only (after 1792 days)
  7.24.21 – When the World Ends (after 1143 days)
  5.20.22 – Time Bomb (after 1365 days)
Venue Picture
Description
Verizon Wireless Amphitheatre is located at 707 Pavilion Boulevard, Charlotte, NC approximately 1.5 miles south of Lowes Motor Speedway.

Past highlights at this venue include: Hootie and the Blowfish guesting on Granny in 1996, the only appearance of the Flecktones on the 1997 Summer Tour that included an incredible drum duet outro on #41, one of the tremendous almost forgotten 1998 Tim Reynolds guest shows, and an incredible old school setlist in 2003.

707 Pavilion Blvd.
Charlotte, NC 28262
